review_title: All I need in one place and superb customer service!
description: Wouldn’t be anywhere else!
author: Rebecca B.
pros: All elements of my business integrated and in one place
cons: Because everything is in one place it took a little while to get confident in using it, but the support materials and customer support made it a smooth operation.

review_title: Simplero is GREAT, but too expensive for my taste
description: Great platform, great support, but too expensive
author: Bente E.
pros: The tech support But I had to join a membership with a professional Simplero user to really learn and understand Simplero
cons: It was far to techy for my taste, as I had already done a website on WordPress, before I purchased Simplero

review_title: Dont waste your money on it!
description: Horrible. I did not want to spend more time learning how to use simplero, than to actually make courses!
author: Laerke S.
pros: I didjn't really like anything about it. I thought it would guide me to be able to get my course online, but you need to be a pro to use Simplero.
cons: It is super complicated. No text based step by step so you have to waste time on videos. You get guided through a lot of unnessesary stuff, and once you have spend lots of time doing it, it isnt covered in the basic plan.

review_title: I can't do business without Simplero
description: I love love love this platform. I sign the praises of Simplero at any and every opportunity presented to me (daily). Customer service is second to none. They have their finger on the pulse of their community and are enhancing and improving the platform all the time. They are listening to what their users are asking for and taking that information and actioning it. Any time I submit a support ticket, the support is super quick, on point and personalised. My only criticism (and it isn't really) is that they don't promote the platform enough...not enough people know what a game-changer Simplero could be in their business. It deserves a cult-following.
author: Rachelle D.
pros: Typically all-in-ones do most things well but aren't exceptional in any particular area as they are generalists rather than specialists. Simplero is the exception to that rule. The features that they provide are amazing and I couldn't pick one thing I like the most. It's all incredible.
cons: Shopping cart function and internal scheduler would be the icing on the cake.

review_title: A definite yes. Simplero has made my life so much easier!
description: Fantastic
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It does everything and they are improving things all the time. Also, great customer service.
cons: It takes a bit of effort to learn because it is so powerful. That said, it is easier than having a WordPress stack and lots of plugins. Simplero is so worth it!

review_title: Flexible software with excellent support
description: I'm saving time and money, feeling more motivated, and enjoying the ease of use. Some software is clever but unpleasant to use whereas Simplero is so enjoyable to use, and I'm jut starting to realise that there are even more benefits than I've perhaps realised. I can run my business and focus on my clients and what I'm trying to achieve, without spending days in search of the right software systems. Every interaction with the Simplero support team is excellent, and the updates and new features feel like they're mind-readers too
author: Susan B.
pros: Simplero is incredibly flexible and has excellent functionality, covering so many areas such as as website development, list management and online training management. It's so good to be able to log in ONE system and be able to ditch the subscriptions to all the other services I had to use before.
cons: It was initially confusing to understand where things are in the initial set-up - mainly because Simplero can do so much. However it didn't take long at all to get round this, and the support service is excellent

review_title: Simplero MADE my business
description: Simplero allowed me to scale without investing in a lot of people. It allows me to automate my services in a way that the clients feel taken care while saving me tons of time.
author: Dolores H.
pros: I've been a simplero customer almost from the beginning and I've truly enjoyed how the software has grown and evolved and my business has grown with it. Simplero is first and for most SIMPLE to use but sophistcated and complete in its funtionality.
cons: At the very beginning, when I first became a client, it did not have some of the features I needed. Even so, the company is so approachable that I would simply have to request what I wanted and the dev team would build it within a few months. Now simplero is very comprehensive and they have way more than what my business needs and I love it!

review_title: I'm moving everything onto Simplero!
description: Simplero has solved the business problem of blog, newsletter, broadcasts, membership site, automation, website, products, shop, courses, programmes, affiliate schemes all under one site that can look like multiple sites and it's done it in a user friendly, intuitive, simple, elegant and productive way. It's nothing short of genius and I'm so glad I found it! It's a game changer!!
author: Ellen W.
pros: I was first attracted to Simplero when I saw one of my students online programmes and it looked really, really good. I was reasonably happy with the platform I was using for courses and programmes but it was limited for products, membership site, and a decent affiliate programme - so I was also using a number of other platforms for those things and it was getting harder and harder to make them all work seamlessly together. I signed up for a free trial on Simplero and within a week I made the commitment to move EVERYTHING over from all my other platforms - SIMPLERO does it all and does it beautifully - I was able to get the Rule the World package and pay for the year and still save money on all the other 'cheaper' packages I was currently cobbling together. This gorgeous package will save me time and money AND allow me to do whatever I come up with to help my students learn more.
cons: Nothing yet - so far, every experience with them has been very positive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simplero makes life easier
description: I help people all over Norway to have a better life through my online courses. I can work from all over the world and have courses in Norway, it's really cool!
author: Veronica Lill H.
pros: I love that I get everything I need to run my online buisiness in Simplero. Customer service is the best of all. I love that I get help quickly and in a Scandinavian language, since I am Norwegian and not so good in English. This is incredibly important to me.
cons: Automation is difficult for me, but it may be because I am not so good at English. Could wish me a Scandinavian training video.
author_profession: Selvstendig næringsdrivende. Mental trener, Forfatter, Coach, Kurs og foredragsholder

review_title: How stupid can a system creator be????
description: horrible
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The thing I like most is I learned how stupid a system can be
cons: So you create a system to create a membership area that allows people to download my content that I created but you don't give me the option to turn it off. Also in the areas where it seems as if I can turn that feature off I still can't and you have a section you created that says "we don't recommend you turn it off" even when you turn it off its still available. I am going to go to every platform and tell everyone "DO NOT USE SIMPLERO UNLESS YOU WANT ALL OF YOUR PRIVATE CONTENT ON YOUTUBE" Yall must be the smartest dummies ever. I will be doing video reviews and everything to stop people from using this system. That is a ridiculous stupid feature.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simplero has nothing simple about it - it takes time to learn it
description: once you know the ropes, you can do a lot of stuff with it.
author: José Luis R.
pros: it is a robust all-in-one platform. you can build just about everything you can think of, and then some ...
cons: the length of time it took me to understand it. also, it is not intuitive when you want to build a funnel, you have to jump from one place to another to put all the pieces together. it takes much longer to build something than with other platforms, especially when you are getting to know Simplero.

review_title: Game changer!
description: Apart from creating an incredible software, the most awesome thing about Simplero is their customer support! They are available to help you every step of the way. They listen to feedback and are genuinely interested and invested in your success. I’m a customer for life!
author: Heather Alice S.
pros: Simplero is incredibly versatile. Every feature has been painstakingly planned, making the user experience exceptional.
cons: The learning curve Needs to be considered when switching to this platform, but that is true of any software.
author_profession: Transformational Life Coach and Intuition/Mindfulness Educator

review_title: Simplero has become my main marketing/sales platform
description: Simplero enabled me to launch a membership site that has grown to be one of the key parts of my business, and also allows me to release selected online courses and content, to customers that attend live courses. The result? My customers now has better ways of learning new skills, and i have most of my communication with them managed in one place.
author: Tue O.
pros: Lots of features, Stability and Good Customer Support
cons: User Interface on the backend takes a bit of work to get familar with - fortunately you can start with something simple and work your way out from there.

review_title: Great Program that is easy to use
description: My greatest challenge in business is putting up a great looking website that integrates with my back office, solving challenges like client communication, billing, collection, and various other tasks. Simplero helps me run my coaching business without a lot of extra things to connect.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very simple to learn and use. I found it very easy to get up and running with their built in training.
cons: My biggest challenge was learning their specific terminology and learning where to find the various components - it does a lot, so lots to remember.
author_profession: Coach and Business Development Manager at Maverick Business Academy.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simplero makes things simple!
description: Love it!
author: Julia J.
pros: All in one! Before Simplero I used 8 different pieces of software which was expensive and time consuming. Not things are so much more quick and easy :)
cons: It is growing quickly and there are a occasionally small bugs, but the team are very responsive.

review_title: Simplero is the BEST!!
description: Fabulous experience for the past 3 years with world class service.
author: Megan M.
pros: It’s so easy and simple to use yet incredibly powerful. I also love the clean design. Mostly I love having everything in one platform.
cons: Nothing. It’s amazing! My experience has really been wonderful.

review_title: World Wide Simplero..(smiles)
description: To reach a lot of Swedes with a low budget (for the moment :-D) You have so many features it take some time (maybe years) to learn them all. (Smiles) But that is Fun! Can't find what is suitable In the section "Industry" on the next page so I chose Art and Craft (Missing Education. High Education doesn't fit my "industry". Thank you!
author: Ann -.
pros: Hi, I like to learn new things and Simplero is so much... It has it all..I think. I haven't used anything else so that's just a thought. It gives me an opportunity to be creative in different ways. Thank you! <3
cons: The Swedish currency (SEK) and Dollars are not in sync! (Smiles)

review_title: Simplero is a great option for all your web needs.
description: Simplero has endeared itself to me in ways no other web builder has. I wish I'd known of it sooner.
author: Laurie O.
pros: There are so many features with Simplero it's hard to choose a favorite. It's got a lot that you need all in one place.
cons: The only complaint I have is that I hadn't found Simplero sooner!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very Sophisticated
author: Christian L.
pros: Has all the functionalities you need to start an online course business: - great website designer at par with some of the best Wordpress themes - structured course building modules supporting all standard features (video, download,quiz...) - ability to build up a complete sales funnel - and important for me, able to handle all EU VAT charges
cons: -Simplero had an extremely tough learning curve - Pricing is 50% higher than other platforms (although you do save as theoretically you no longer need a Mailchimp account) -Steep price increases over that last couple of years (personally I'm at the limit)

review_title: For the love of it all ... don't
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like that there is a community can be integrated into the membership.
cons: It's too convoluted. There are too many options and not enough customization options n the design.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SIMPLERO makes it simple!
description: I love that I can see my email list and campaigns all in one place...watch the performance of emails and open rates...Can't wait to have it house my programs.....your support staff is golden! Thank you!
author: Elynn L.
pros: I love that it can house my programs, my email list, web pages...and as I grow it can support my business.
cons: I'm not a techie...hmmm...well, I guess the fact that it does' nt interface better with Leadpages...or is it more accurate that Leadpages isn't as friendly with you?

review_title: Possibly the best integrated membership/e-learning software I've found so far.
description: Clean, slick, intuitive for a 'complex' software that has many different features packed into it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's feature sets are the most complete yet not overwrought with 'unnecessary extras'. Simplicity at it's best!
cons: There is really not much to complain about...
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
